overview: CyberShield Platform is an enterprise-grade cybersecurity SaaS dashboard with a dark neon aesthetic. Features a premium product UI with real-time threat monitoring, AI-powered vulnerability analysis, scan center with terminal view, threat intelligence, and enterprise-grade reporting — all wrapped in a glassmorphic depth design system with animated micro-interactions.
features: Enterprise dark neon dashboard with System Control Panel (API status, active scans, AI engine, queue)
Live Activity Feed with real-time scan events and vulnerability alerts
AI Insight Cards with intelligent security recommendations
Animated Security Score with circular graph and risk breakdown (Network, Web, API)
3-panel AI Agent page with target input, AI thinking timeline, and vulnerability output panel
AI Brain Visual with node-connection attack path visualization
Scan Center with terminal view, hacker typing animation, and animated pipeline visual
Unified Threat Intelligence cards with risk severity classification
Enterprise Report page with executive summary, CVSS scores, and attack path diagram
Premium depth card system with gradient borders, inner glow, soft shadows, and hover elevation
Loading skeletons, empty states, and friendly error states throughout
HTTP outcalls for Gemini AI analysis integration
